name: Gourmet Quick Rice Pilaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion and garlic in stock for 3 minutes.
2. Add remaining vegetables, soy sauce, and sherry (if using) to the pan. Cook for an additional 3 minutes.
3. Combine the cooked vegetables with the cooked brown rice and serve hot.
Per serving: Calories: 111; Protein: 3g; Carbohydrates: 23g; Fat: trace; Sodium: 116mg; Cholesterol: 0mg
Adapted from Cooking for Good Health by Gloria Rose (ISBN: 0-89529-577-6)
Entered by Carolyn Shaw on 3-95.
